titleStmt.title: SII 9.674: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 674. (A.R. No. 397 of 1928.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE PRAKARA OF THE TEMPLE OF SANKARANARAYANA AT THE VILLAGE, SANKARANARAYANA, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1485, Dundubhi, Jyēshṭha, śu. [7], Ādivāra, corresponding to A.D. 1562 May 10 Sunday, in the reign of Sadāśivarāya-Mahārāya. It records that when the king granted as amaramāgaṇi, to Yeḍavamurāri, Kōṭekōlāhala, Paḍuvaṇasamudrādhīśvara Sadāśivarāya-Nāyaka of Keḷadi, son of Chavuḍa-Gauṇḍa of Keḷadi, the districts of Āraga, Gutti, Tuḷurājya, and Bārakūru and Maṅgalūru, 56 gāvudas in length, Sadāśiva-Nāyaka constructed a maṭha for Virūpākshadēva and having purchased some land from Kupāra-Kēśava-Hebāruva made a gift of it for bhikshā in the maṭha. The gift was made in the presence of the god Śaṅkara-Nārāyaṇa, a sacred place in the Tuḷu-rājya, for the final beatitude of the parents of Sadāśiva-Nāyaka viz., Chauḍapa and Tirumamma.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē(ṁ) namaḥ . śubhamastu . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaraThis line is superfluous.
śrīgaṇādhipatayē(ṁ) namaḥ . śubhamastu namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracā
maracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī
jayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruśā 1485 neya varttamāna veva
hārika duṁdubhisaṁvatsara jyēṣṭa śu 7 Ādivāradalu śrīmaṁ
mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa Uttaradakṣiṇa
pūrvapaścimacatusamudrādhīśvarā sadāsivarāyamahārāyaru vidyāna
gariya siṁhyāsanavanu sakaladharmavanu pratipālisikoṁḍu sukhasa
ṁkathāvinōdadiṁda rājyavanu pratipālisikoṁḍiha sameyada
li yeḍavamurāri kōṭekōḷāhāḷā paḍuvaṇasamudrādhīśvara
keḷadiya cauḍagoṁḍara makaḷu keḷadiya sadāsivarāya
nāyakarige Āraga gutti muvattāṟu kaṁpaṇa tuḷurājya bā
rukūra maṁgalūra Ayivatāṟu gāvuda muṁtādavanu
Amaramāgaṇiyāgi pālisida sameyadali tu
ḷurājyake pu(ṁ)ṇyastaḷavāda śaṁkharanārāyaṇasvāmiya
saṁnidhiyali keḷadiya sadāsivarāyanāyakaAyanava
ru taṁma taṁde cauḍapagu taṁma tāyi tirumaṁmanava
rigu kayilāsapadaviyāgabēkeṁdu virūpākṣadēvarige
kaṭisi Ā maṭake bhikṣa svastikupāra kēśavahebāruvana kaya
koṁḍa bhūmi krayaśāsanada vivarā . tatsaṁvatsarada jēṣṭa śu
dha 7 Ādivāradalū śrīmatu sakalaguṇasaṁpaṁnarāda
duṣṭanigrahasiṣṭapratipālakarāda keḷadiya sadāśi
varāyanāyakaAyanavara pādake kuppāra Aṁṇi
hebāruvana maga kēśavahebāruvanu koṭa bhūmiya
kraya mūlasādhanada kramaveṁtaṁdare kuppāṟa grāmadoḷage
goruteyaṁba bhūmiyali naṁna pitrārjitavāgi baṁdu
baṁdaṁtha mūlasarvasvada bhūmiyanā dēvarige krayamūlavāgi ko
ṭṭenāgi �yo bhūmiya gadeya vivarā . gaṁgādve kūḍaṇa hā
ḷi saha bittuva bījavari nāghaṁḍugadallū mu 5 vottire naḍuvaṇa
hoḷeyeṁba gadde bījavari nāghaṁḍugadalu mu 6 toṭaluga
de bittuva bījavari nāghaṁḍugadalu mu 3 baṁkana gade bāḷeya hā
ḷi saha bittuva bījavari nāghaṁḍugadallu muḍi 4 kēdageya gadde bitu va
bījavari nāghaṁḍugadalū mu 4 hastānaṁba gade paḍuva beṭṭasa
ha bittuva bījavari nāghaṁḍugadallu mu 5 kiriyaṇahe
bāruvana maneṭāu mallagade nāghaṁḍugadallu mu 4 Ā
gadeya keḷage hūvina maki nāghaṁḍugadalū mu 2 mallagare
ya paḍuvalu diṁbadamakki mēlaṇa mallagade saha nāghaṁḍu
gadalu mu 6 Aṁttu bayalu mu 27 mallagade makkiyida mu
12 Ubhayaṁ mu 36 kke catusīmeya vivarā mūḍalū harida
hoḷeyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalū taṁkalū dēvasvada bayalagadeyiṁ
dalu Uḍupana makiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalū paḍuvalū yettira Agaḷiṁdaṁ
muḍalū baḍagalu teṁganavoḍeya bayala gaddeyiṁdalu vōḍe
marana makiya vōṇiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalū yiṁtiya ca
tusīmeyoḷage saluva bituva bījavari nāghaṁḍugadalu mu 39 A
kṣaradalu muvattoṁbhattu muḍi gadde yī bhūmige saluva
gēṇi varuśa 1 kke savaḍada Aṁgaḍiya koḷagada lekkadali nāgha
ṁḍugadalū Akiya muḍi 81 ke Aramaneya sidhāyake A
kiya muḍi 319 śudha dēvarige salisuva guttige muḍi
50 Akṣaradalū muḍi Āyivattu muḍiyanu koṭu krittike
yalū salisibahenu

yī śāsanadalli barada bhūmiya mūlacalitada kraya
mūlakke niṁma kayya tegedukoṁḍadu bārakūra pariva
rtanakke salluva modalavaraha va 200 Akṣaradalū yiṁnū
ru varahava tegedukoṁḍenu yī bhūmiyanu kuppāṟa
grāmada Appaṁḍadali teṟu birāḍavellava nānē tettu ba 4 mū
ḍe 50 nu koṭṭubahenu yī bhūmiya parivokkalinikki neṁ
bāḷa biḍuvenu yī bhūmiyoḷagaṇa phala nidhi nikṣēpa
jala pāsāṇa Akṣīṇi Āgāmi siddhasādhyādi hraṣa
laga(ṁ)ḷeṁba Aṣṭabhōgatējasāmyaṁgaḷa krayadhārāpū
rvakavāgi naṁma svarūciyiṁ strīputrādisāvaṁtadāyā
dyaranumatadiṁda voḍaṁbaṭṭu koṭṭa krayasādhana yiṁ
tappudakke sākṣigaḷu kuppāṟajaṁni hiriyanārāyaṇa
yeḍehāḷa saṁkappa yaḍehaḷana maga nārāyaṇayeḍe
hāḷa Ā karttana suhastada voppa kuppāṟa vināyakada
kēśavahebāruvana baraha sākṣiya voppita sūrāma
ciṁneyarasa toḷahara sākṣiya voppita mahāliṁgapaṁ
ḍitaru �yo śāsanedoḷagidda kuppāṟa hebbāruvarallikoṁ
ḍa bhūmiyu tirumala toḷahara Aḷiyaṁdiru
ceṁneyarasatoḷahara koṁḍa haradahaḷiya
staḷada marijayamagade 60 mūḍe gadde
ya voḷagaṇa mālāḍiyalli 40 mūḍe gadde Aṁtu
100 mūḍe Akkiya gaddeyanū va 400 varahakke
sadāśivanāyakaru koṁḍa muttina pe
yada virūpākṣadēvarige siṣyaparāṁpari
yalli saluvaḷiyāgi samarppisideU yī Ubha
yanaḷipidavaru mātru guru gō strī brahmāhatyaga
ḷeṁba paṁcamahāpātakakke hōharu subhama
stu śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.674 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
